_comment: Check ID -> compliance mapping. Verify TSC wording against the current AICPA Trust Services Criteria before shipping customer-facing evidence language.

UC-001.name: S3 public access
UC-001.control_statement: Logical access to data storage is restricted; system boundaries prevent public exposure of stored data.

UC-002.name: Security group open to internet
UC-002.control_statement: Network boundaries restrict inbound access to administrative and database services from untrusted networks.

UC-003.name: Root account MFA
UC-003.control_statement: Privileged account access requires multi-factor authentication.

UC-003b.name: Root access keys
UC-003b.control_statement: Long-lived credentials for the privileged root account do not exist.

UC-004.name: IAM policy allows *:* admin access
UC-004.control_statement: Access permissions follow least privilege; full administrative policies are not attached broadly.

UC-005.name: CloudTrail disabled or not multi-region
UC-005.control_statement: System activity is logged across all regions to support monitoring and incident investigation.

UC-006.name: Access keys older than 90 days
UC-006.control_statement: Credentials are rotated on a defined schedule.

UC-008.name: RDS snapshot public
UC-008.control_statement: Database snapshots are not shared publicly.

UC-009.name: EC2 IMDSv1 enabled
UC-009.control_statement: Instance metadata access requires session-based tokens (IMDSv2).

UC-010.name: Lambda over-privileged execution role
UC-010.control_statement: Workload execution roles follow least privilege.
